criteria.criterion: DBB-001: grep -r recursive search returns all matching lines
DBB-002: grep -r no match returns empty output, exit code 1
DBB-003: grep -r on non-existent directory returns error
DBB-004: pipe cat file | grep pattern returns matching lines
DBB-005: pipe echo | grep returns correct output
DBB-006: pipe left command fails — error propagates, grep skipped
DBB-007: error message file not found in UNIX format
DBB-008: error message directory operation failure
DBB-009: error message rm non-existent path
DBB-012: test suite exists and passes
DBB-013: test coverage >= 80% (thresholds in vitest.config.ts, not CI-enforced)
DBB-014: each command has at least one test
DBB-015: boundary empty file returns empty output
DBB-016: boundary special characters in filename
